posts.message:
🦆 Duck Egg Update from Roswell Family Farm 🥚❤️

Our duck eggs are temporarily on hold while we give our mama ducks the chance to do what they do best—hatch the next generation of fluffy ducklings! 🐥

Watching nature take its course is something we truly value here on the farm, and we’re excited to welcome some new little quackers soon.

We appreciate everyone’s patience and understanding while our ducks focus on growing the future of our flock. We’ll let everyone know as soon as fresh duck eggs are available again!

Thank you for supporting local farming and following along on this adventure. We can’t wait to introduce you to the newest members of the Roswell Family Farm family! 💚

👽 Roswell Family Farm
Abducted by Flavor

🛸 THEY CALL IT CHICKEN.
WE CALL IT A CLOSE ENCOUNTER.

Not all chicken is created equal.

At Roswell Family Farm, our chickens are raised on pasture with room to roam, fresh air, sunshine, and the care that only a family farm can provide.

Whether you’re looking for:

🐔 Whole Chickens
🍗 Wings
🍗 Drumsticks
🍗 Thighs
🍗 Leg Quarters
🍗 Breasts

…you’re getting chicken raised the way nature intended.

No added water.
No fillers.
No mystery.

Just real chicken from a local family farm.

And yes, our tenderloin stays attached to the breast where nature intended—because a chicken breast should actually be a chicken breast.

📍 Roswell Family Farm
🛣 I-90 Exit 29A – Dolgeville, NY

The truth is out there…

SO IS BETTER CHICKEN.

Fresh from our pastures to your table.
